steps.t: Hithlos's vase, goblet, box, and harp can be found in Felegoth. You should seek out Hithlos's lost items.
Hithlos can be found in Felegoth. You should bring the items you found to Hithlos.
Flowers can be found in the gardens of Felegoth. You should pick flowers for Hithlos's vase.
Hithlos's vase can be found beside him in Felegoth. You should put the flowers in the vase for Hithlos.
Hithlos can be found in Felegoth. You should talk to Hithlos.
